title: Foods to Eat
items: Leafy greens for folate and iron
Lean proteins: chicken, fish, eggs, legumes
Whole grains: oats, brown rice, quinoa
Dairy or fortified alternatives for calcium
Healthy fats: avocado, nuts, olive oil

title: Foods to Avoid
items: Raw or undercooked meat, fish, and eggs
Alcohol — no safe amount during pregnancy

title: Cravings Guide
items: Sweet cravings: try fruit or yogurt with honey
Ice cravings may signal iron needs
Spicy food is generally safe if tolerated
Non-food cravings should be discussed with your doctor

title: First Trimester Focus
items: Ginger tea may ease morning sickness
Stay hydrated even when appetite is low
